nasb.text: Also to Shem, the father of all the children of Eber, and the older brother of Japheth, children were born.

esv.text: To Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the elder brother of Japheth, children were born.

cnv.text: 雅弗的哥哥閃，就是希伯所有子孫的祖宗，他也生了孩子。

ccb.text: 雅弗的哥哥闪是希伯子孙的祖先。

csbs.text: 闪也生了儿子；闪是希伯所有子孙的祖先，是雅弗的哥哥。
